title: #29 - Tosh Tudor HATES Vegemite + The Secret To Getting Waves At Pipe
summary: In this episode, we catch up with Vans athlete Tosh Tudor. We discuss growing up as the son of a multiple world champion, paving his own path and establishing his place in the lineup at Pipe. #surfing #surf #podcast #surfer #vans #barrel

title: #28 - Our 2025 WSL J-Bay Open Preview + Ballito Pro Wrap-Up
summary: In this episode we wrap up all the action from the recent Ballito Pro. We then preview the upcoming WSL J-Bay Open and go through our fantasy selections. #surfing #podcast #surf #wsl #surfer

title: #27 - Lennix Smith Runs Us Through 'That Semi Final' At Nias + WSL Rio Pro Review
summary: In this episode, we get all the inside gossip from the recent Australasian QS leg in Indonesia. Lennix Smith runs us through 'that semi final' and gives his side of events on what really occurred. We then go into a quick wrap up of the WSL Vivo Rio Pro that just went down. #sufing #surf #wsl #podcast #surfer #indonesia #barrel
